CRITICAL.name: data_freshness_breach
CRITICAL.condition: Pipeline has not run in more than 24 hours
CRITICAL.message: Data freshness is breached: Pipeline has not run in more than 24 hours.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and restart the pipeline immediately.

CRITICAL.name: quality_threshold_breach
CRITICAL.message: Data quality is breached: Quality percentage is below 99.9%.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve data quality issues immediately.

CRITICAL.name: row_count_out_of_bounds
CRITICAL.condition: Row count is outside the range of 17 to 25
CRITICAL.message: Row count is breached: Count is outside the range of 17 to 25.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and correct the row count issue immediately.

WARNING.name: runtime_approaching_limit
WARNING.message: Pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit.
WARNING.recommended_action: Monitor the pipeline runtime and optimize if necessary.

WARNING.name: quality_slightly_below_threshold
WARNING.condition: Data quality percentage is slightly below 99.9%
WARNING.message: Data quality is slightly below threshold: Quality percentage is 99.85%.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate and address data quality issues.

WARNING.name: merchant_failure_rate_spike
WARNING.condition: One merchant's failure rate spikes above 30%
WARNING.message: One merchant's failure rate has spiked above 30%.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the issue with the merchant's data.

INFO.name: new_payment_method_detected
INFO.condition: A new payment method is detected in the data
INFO.message: A new payment method has been detected in the data.
INFO.recommended_action: Log the new payment method for future reference.

INFO.name: row_count_near_bounds
INFO.condition: Daily row count is near the bounds of 17 to 25
INFO.message: Daily row count is near the bounds of 17 to 25.
INFO.recommended_action: Monitor the row count for any trends.
